name: Submit Conditional offer successfully

steps.name: Given the offers API is available
When I create an offer using "submitConditionalOffer.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should have offerCode "RLM backend use cases"
And the response status should be "LoadedToCampaign"

fullName: Submit Conditional Offer: Submit Conditional offer successfully
